enrichment.summary: Kyle records a redo vlog after his computer crashed and lost the original recording. He recaps his day: waking up at 6am (7 hours sleep), dealing with traffic and snow on a hardware store run to buy filming lights, organizing his room, and discovering a major data error in bike race speed data he had printed out — a big discrepancy in speeds past 24 mph that he thought was perfect. He plans to fix the issue the next morning.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: finding a big problem late in the day
stances.position: Stop working when you find a problem that big; tackle it fresh the next day
Must fix immediately even if he didn't want to work on the page

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His computer screen turned black after he tried to save a video he had just recorded.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had to restart his computer because it stopped responding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The video he named and saved was lost after the restart.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had to re-record the video because the original was lost.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His first computer died after about a year of use.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got up at 1 PM the previous day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't get much done during the day due to traffic and snow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He bought two lights for filming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He spent time organizing his room.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He discovered a major problem with the bike race data he had printed and organized.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There was a huge discrepancy in the speeds recorded in the bike race data.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He initially thought the data was perfect but later realized it was flawed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to fix the data issues the next day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He might have to rebrand and recut the data or manually correct entries after the 24-mile mark.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't want to work on his website but feels compelled to fix the data immediately.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He also has a problem with his fluid trainer that needs fixing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hates having to redo videos or tasks.
